title: The Hub (disambiguation)
content:
'''The Hub''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[The Hub]]''', a building located in [[Kestro]], the [[capital]] [[city]] of [[Vardos]].
*[[The Hub (Home One)|The Hub]], a room aboard the ''[[Home One]]''

==Legends==
*'''[[The Hub (computer)|The Hub]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] super computer that was used to coordinate the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
*'''[[The Hub (Zirtran's Anchor)|The Hub]]''', an area aboard the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']].
*'''[[The Hub (Maw Installation)|The Hub]]''', the central section of the [[Maw Installation]].

{{Disambig}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Hub, The}}
